executionHistory.executionNote: runSubagent/agent tool was unavailable in this runtime; the product-to-planning phases (analyze, design, plan, harden) were executed in parent-expanded form by a single orchestrator agent that authored the planning artifacts directly. No separate certified specialist sub-agents (bubbles.analyst/ux/design/plan/harden) were dispatched. Artifacts are reviewable planning documents at the specs_hardened ceiling; no implementation occurred.
executionHistory.summary: Planned absorption of standalone CCManager app into smackerel as a native 'card rewards' feature (docs/smackerel.md §16.8 Financial Awareness, light-touch, recommendation-only; confirmed NOT crossing §1.6/Principle 10 QF boundary). Authored spec.md (7 use cases, 20 FRs, 7 NFRs, Product Principle Alignment, Release Train=mvp, Offline/Host note, 6 open questions), design.md (10-table PostgreSQL schema, source connector, strict-schema LLM extraction replacing the CCManager regex scraper, multi-source reconciliation + Principle-3 lifecycle, optimizer, CalDAV delivery reusing the internal/mealplan CalendarBridge pattern, rationalized Web UI IA mapping CCManager's ~22 screens to 10 smackerel pages, config SST keys fail-loud per smackerel-no-defaults, JSON→PG one-time migration), and scopes.md (11 dependency-ordered scopes, SCN-083-A01..K08 Gherkin, Test Plan tables, tiered checkbox DoD; data migration and LLM extraction are dedicated scopes with adversarial tests vs the regex failure modes; UI has two dedicated e2e-ui scopes). All reused primitives cited by verified path. Next migration 057; flag card_rewards default-ON in mvp (bundle edit deferred to delivery, owned by bubbles.train).

executionHistory.summary: Scope 01 delivered + validated with real in-session evidence. Files: internal/db/migrations/057_card_rewards.sql (10 tables — card_catalog, card_runs, user_cards, card_offers, card_selections, signup_bonuses, rotating_category_observations, rotating_categories, category_aliases, card_recommendations — with CHECK/FK/UNIQUE constraints + indexes, CREATE … IF NOT EXISTS self-idempotent); internal/config/cardrewards.go (CardRewardsConfig + fail-loud LoadCardRewardsConfig, wired into Load()); internal/config/cardrewards_test.go; config/smackerel.yaml (card_rewards section enabled:false dev placeholder + connectors.card-rewards); scripts/commands/config.sh (13 CARD_REWARDS_* vars via yaml_get/yaml_get_json); tests/integration/card_rewards_migration_test.go. Evidence: SCN-083-A01/A03/A04/A07 unit PASS (ok github.com/smackerel/smackerel/internal/config 0.021s); A02 config generate emitted all 13 CARD_REWARDS_* vars into dev.env+test.env; A05/A06 migration integration PASS on a live disposable Postgres (--- PASS: TestCardRewardsMigration_AppliesCleanly; INTEGRATION_EXIT=0; full stack teardown clean). Build Quality Gate GREEN: format --check FORMAT_EXIT=0 (63 files already formatted), check CHECK_EXIT=0 (Config is in sync with SST, env_file drift guard OK, scenario-lint OK), lint LINT_EXIT=0 (All checks passed! + Web validation passed); artifact-lint exit 0; no ${VAR:-default} runtime fallback introduced (smackerel-no-defaults). Continuation: implement Scope 02 (Card Domain Store, Types & CRUD API; depends on 01) next, then 03-11 in DAG order; each remaining scope needs live-PG integration / live-Ollama (spec-043) / Playwright e2e-ui evidence before its DoD can be honestly checked.

executionHistory.summary: Scope 02 delivered + validated with real in-session evidence (SCN-083-B01..B08, all 8 scenarios). Files: internal/cardrewards/{types,resolve,store,service}.go (pgx CRUD for catalog/user_cards/offers/selections/signup_bonuses/category_aliases + transactional custom-card insert; deterministic dependency-free resolver replacing card_resolver.py; service with UUID gen + validation + sentinel errors); internal/cardrewards/{resolve_test,store_test}.go; internal/api/cardrewards.go (REST handler, relative-prefix routes, sentinel-error→HTTP mapping); internal/api/health.go (+Dependencies.CardRewardsHandler); internal/api/router.go (mount in bearer-auth group); cmd/core/wiring.go (+wireCardRewardsHandler) + main.go (call before NewRouter); scripts/runtime/go-integration.sh (+./internal/cardrewards/...); tests/e2e/cardrewards_api_test.go. Decisions disclosed: (1) JSON=snake_case to match the whole smackerel API surface + design.md examples (prompt 'camelCase' is the WA/GH convention; HARD CONSISTENCY 'reuse verbatim' governs); (2) CRUD handler mounts on pg-pool presence, NOT gated on card_rewards.enabled (ingestion scopes 04/05/09 stay gated), so e2e runs with dev default enabled:false unchanged and no config edit. Two real bugs were caught by the live integration tests and fixed in source (not worked around): aliases TEXT[] NOT NULL rejecting nil []string (SQLSTATE 23502 → nonNilStrings guard), and UUID-typed PK columns rejecting string ids (SQLSTATE 22P02 → uuid.NewString() in the test). Evidence: resolve unit 7/7 PASS (ok internal/cardrewards 0.014s); store integration B01/B04/B05/B06/B07 all PASS on live disposable Postgres (PASS: go-integration); e2e B08 CRUD round-trip PASS on the live stack with rebuilt core image (POST 201→GET 200→PUT 200→DELETE 204→GET 404 CARD_NOT_FOUND). Build Quality Gate GREEN: CHECK_EXIT=0, LINT_EXIT=0 (All checks passed! + web validation), FORMAT_CHECK_EXIT=0 (63 files already formatted). Continuation: implement Scope 03 (Data Migration CCManager JSON→PostgreSQL; depends on 02) next, then 04-11 in DAG order.

executionHistory.summary: Scope 03 delivered + validated with real in-session evidence (SCN-083-C01..C06). Files: internal/cardrewards/import.go (CCManager DTOs + pure transforms + RunImport idempotent/partial-tolerant orchestrator + ImportReport); import_transform_test.go (16 unit tests); import_test.go (4 //go:build integration tests); testdata/ccmanager/* (hermetic fixtures mirroring real CCManager shapes with intentional skip cases); types.go (+RotatingCategory/CardRecommendation/CardRun + lifecycle/run enums); store.go (+GetOrCreateUserCardByCatalog/InsertOfferIfAbsent/InsertSelectionIfAbsent/InsertSignupBonusIfAbsent/InsertRunIfAbsent/CountRunsByType/UpsertRotatingCategory/UpsertRecommendation/CreateRun/ListRotatingCategoriesByCard); cmd/cardrewards-import/main.go (thin CLI, --data-dir/CARD_REWARDS_IMPORT_DIR fail-loud); internal/config/cardrewards.go (+optional ImportDataDir); config/smackerel.yaml (+card_rewards.import_data_dir placeholder); scripts/commands/config.sh (+CARD_REWARDS_IMPORT_DIR read+emit). Decisions disclosed: card_type explicit map (tiered→user-selected, flat/store/hotel/airline→fixed, unknown→skip+log); idempotency via ON CONFLICT (catalog/aliases/rotating/recommendations) + INSERT…WHERE NOT EXISTS…IS NOT DISTINCT FROM (user_cards/offers/selections/bonuses/runs); rotating seeded manual_override=true confidence=1; migration audit run appended each invocation (Principle 8); run-history maps only the CHECK-valid subset (user_change/github_sync skipped+logged); data dir invocation-gated fail-loud (never a committed real path; SST placeholder empty). Evidence: 16 transform unit PASS (ok internal/cardrewards 0.033s, UNIT_TRANSFORM_EXIT=0); 4 integration PASS on live disposable Postgres — CatalogAndAliases_C01_C05 (catalog 7, aliases 8, amazon offers 3 shared-limit 100000c, citi sel 1, usbank tiered sel 3, citi bonuses 2, recs 2026-01=2/2025-12=1), RotatingManualOverride_C03 (discover-it Q1_2026=[Grocery Stores,Wholesale Clubs,Streaming], manual_override=true, lifecycle active, limit 150000c), PartialFileToleranceAndRunLogged_C04_C06 (missing user-offers.json skipped, status partial, run_type=migration logged), Idempotent_C02 (second run zero new data rows; migration audit +1) — ok internal/cardrewards 0.390s, PASS: go-integration, clean teardown, INTEGRATION_EXIT=0. Build Quality Gate GREEN: CONFIG_GENERATE_EXIT=0, FORMAT_CHECK_EXIT=0, CHECK_EXIT=0 (Config in sync with SST + env_file drift OK + scenario-lint OK), LINT_EXIT=0 (All checks passed! + Web validation). No ${VAR:-default} runtime fallback (smackerel-no-defaults). Continuation: implement Scope 04 (Card-Rewards Source Connector; depends on 01,02) next, then 05-11 in DAG order.

executionHistory.summary: Scope 04 delivered + validated with real in-session unit evidence (SCN-083-D01..D06, all 6 scenarios PASS + edges). Files: internal/connector/cardrewards/connector.go (NEW — fetch-only connector.Connector impl; ConnectorID=card-rewards hardcoded via New(); Source type; fail-loud parseSources/parseFetchTimeout with NO defaults; per-source context.WithTimeout isolation; validateSourceURL SSRF guard [scheme allowlist + private/loopback rejection] with allowPrivateHosts white-box test seam; CheckRedirect refuses redirects; RawContent verbatim + Metadata={source_name,source_url,issuer_hint} only — NO regexp import, NO category parsing; consecutiveErrors mapped via connector.HealthFromErrorCount; cursor=last successful fetch RFC3339Nano; LastSyncStats accessor); internal/connector/cardrewards/connector_test.go (NEW — 14 white-box test funcs + 8 subtests covering D01 interface+ID, D06 cursor, D02 source-attributed emission, D03 verbatim/no-parse, D04 slow-source isolation [LastSyncStats 1/1, degraded], D05 health thresholds [1-4 healthy, 5 degraded, 10 failing], plus SuccessResets/TotalFailureKeepsCursor/FailsLoud×8/BeforeConnect/Close/SSRFGuard/generic-config-parser); cmd/core/connectors.go (M +36 — import cardrewardsConnector; cardRewardsConn:=New(); added to registration slice; auto-start block gated on cfg.CardRewards.Enabled mapping cfg.CardRewards.Sources to []cardrewards.Source + fetch_timeout_seconds via SourceConfig). Decisions disclosed: (1) New() hardcodes ID (mirrors guesthost.New()) so D01 cannot break; (2) config read from ConnectorConfig.SourceConfig (canonical framework pattern), fail-loud no-default; (3) Source declared locally (no internal/config import — no cycle); (4) SSRF guard defense-in-depth with allowPrivateHosts test seam so loopback httptest works while prod stays safe; (5) 'register in registry.go' honored at the canonical site cmd/core/registerConnectors (registry.go is the generic Registry type); (6) cmd/core/main_test.go curated 15-connector list NOT modified (it does not call registerConnectors and already omits qf-decisions — out of scope, still passes). Evidence: go test ./... finished OK; ok internal/connector/cardrewards 0.333s; cmd/core compiled (ok cmd/core). Build Quality Gate GREEN: check (config in sync + env_file drift OK + scenario-lint OK), format --check (63 files already formatted), lint (All checks passed! + Web validation passed); no ${VAR:-default} runtime fallback (smackerel-no-defaults); artifact-lint recorded in report.md. Continuation: implement Scope 05 (LLM Category Extraction; depends on 04) next — requires live-Ollama (spec-043) extraction evidence.

executionHistory.summary: Scope 05 (LLM Category Extraction — replaces the CCManager regex scraper) implement+test delivered with real in-session evidence; 7 of 8 DoD items [x], one blocked-needs-live-Ollama. Constitution C2 honored: the model-gateway call lives ONLY in ml/app/card_categories.py (NEW POST /extract-card-categories route, mounted under verify_auth; pure build_extraction_messages with prompt-injection-defended system prompt + delimited PAGE_CONTENT data block; parse_strict_response first strict-JSON pass; litellm lazily imported so the dev test lane needs no litellm). Go orchestrator internal/cardrewards/extract.go (NEW): pure validateExtraction (santhosh-tekuri/jsonschema/v6 strict schema + card/period echo defense + date checks + unknown-card skip + low-confidence flag), Extractor.Run (SidecarExtractor seam + real Store + extract audit run), HTTPSidecarExtractor (POST /extract-card-categories, Bearer, fail-loud constructor; NO direct model client — C2 grep zero hits). store.go: GetRotatingCategory, ListObservationsByCardPeriod, transactional PersistExtractionRun (FK-safe run→observations→flag; flag only sets needs_verification, never overwrites). types.go: RotatingCategoryObservation + CardPeriodRef. Tests: extract_test.go (unit E01-E07 pure + httptest transport + fail-loud; ok internal/cardrewards 0.208s with 8 adversarial discard subtests); extract_integration_test.go (live-PG E01-E07 + audit run via a fake of the EXTERNAL model-gateway boundary — Store+DB real, no internal mocks; INTEG_EXIT=0); tests/integration/cardrewards_extract_test.go (E08 live round-trip, re-gated on sidecar reachability); ml/tests/test_card_categories.py (E01+E06 pure; python 509 passed/2 skipped). Adversarial proof: TestExtractorLivePG_MalformedDiscardedNoOverwrite_E02_E03 seeds an authoritative existing rotating_categories row, feeds garbage, and asserts categories/confidence/manual_override UNCHANGED + needs_verification flipped — the exact CCManager silent-fallback failure mode proven fixed on live PG. E08 live: orchestrator hit the REAL /extract-card-categories route → HTTP 502 model-gateway-unreachable (litellm APIConnectionError; disposable-stack Ollama serves no pulled LLM model, integration lane runs no ollama-test-pull and does not forward SMACKEREL_TEST_OLLAMA) → orchestrator FAILED LOUD (discarded+flagged+audited), test PASS; a SUCCESSFUL Ollama inference is blocked-needs-live-Ollama (satisfiable on the <home-lab-host> ops node). Build gates: C2 grep zero hits; CHECK_EXIT=0; LINT_EXIT=0; FORMAT_RECHECK_EXIT=0; artifact-lint PASSED. Reconciled pre-existing card-rewards doc-drift (connector count 16→17 in smackerel.md §22.7 + Development.md; internal/cardrewards + 057 migration doc rows; self-adjusting connector-count adversarial fixture) → internal/deploy + internal/docfreshness green. Pre-existing out-of-domain internal/scopesdriftguard ratchet (287>270) was NOT introduced by Scope 05 (work reduced 083's contribution ~292→287); ratchet NOT raised. Continuation: Scope 06 (Multi-Source Reconciliation & Category Lifecycle; depends on 05) next.

executionHistory.summary: Scope 06 (Multi-Source Reconciliation & Category Lifecycle) VERIFIED + CERTIFIED with real in-session evidence; all 6 DoD items [x]. No implementation bug found — reconcile.go/store.go/types.go NOT modified. Unit (./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run 'TestReconcile_'): UNIT_EXIT=0; TestReconcile_MergeAgreement_F01 PASS, TestReconcile_MergeDisagreement_F02 PASS (ADVERSARIAL disagreement→needs_verification=true, conservative conf 0.88, source_count=1), TestReconcile_ManualOverrideNeverOverwritten_F03 PASS (ADVERSARIAL high-conf 0.99 disagreeing obs does NOT overwrite manual_override; categories/conf/flags unchanged), TestReconcile_LifecycleByDate_F04_F05 PASS (6 subtests incl. boundary days + undated→unknown), plus LowConfidenceFlags_A2 + NoObservationsKeepsExisting. Integration (./smackerel.sh test integration --go-run 'ReconcileLivePG' on the disposable test stack, live PG): INTEG_EXIT=0; TestReconcileLivePG_IdempotentUpsert_F07 PASS (reconcile twice → exactly 1 rotating_categories row per (card,period) + stable id; REGRESSION guard), TestReconcileLivePG_PendingReEnrollment_F06 PASS (only window-opening-today & not-enrolled surfaced, count=1 via AdvanceLifecycle and ListPendingReEnrollments), TestReconcileLivePG_LifecycleTransitions_F04_F05 PASS (upcoming→active & active→expired; expired EXCLUDED from active set), TestReconcileLivePG_DisagreementRetainsBothObservations_F02 PASS (needs_verification=true + both observations retained), TestReconcileLivePG_ManualOverrideNotRewritten_F03 PASS (overrides_protected=1, reconciled=0, observation retained for audit); disposable stack fully torn down (all containers + 3 volumes + network removed — ephemeral isolation). executionHistory.summary: Scope 08 (CalDAV Calendar Delivery) IMPLEMENTED + certified Done with real in-session evidence; all 6 DoD items [x]. New internal/cardrewards/calendar.go: CalDAVClient interface (same shape as mealplan.CalDAVClient — design §7 reuse, not a new client), CardCalendarBridge with stable UID scheme (<prefix>-cardrec-<period>-<slug>, e.g. smackerel-cardrec-2026-06-restaurants; <prefix>-cardreenroll-<user_card_id>-<period>), SyncRecommendations/SyncReEnrollments (input-taking, fake-client testable), DeleteRecommendationEvent (cleanup), and store-driven SyncPeriod (persists calendar_event_uid + writes a card_runs run_type=calendar_sync audit row with events_written, Principle 8). Unit (./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run 'CardCalendarBridge' --verbose): UNIT_EXIT=0; H01 stable-UID create PASS, H02 ADVERSARIAL re-sync-updates-same-UID PASS (putCalls=2 yet exactly 1 event, summary updated 3%→5% — fails if UID not stable), H03 re-enrollment event PASS, H04 disabled-sync-skips-writes-keeps-data PASS (Skipped=true, 0 PutEvent calls, recommendation data intact for Web UI), H05 delete-cleans-up-event PASS (deleteCalls=1 + no-UID no-op), plus UIDSchemes + NonMonthPeriodCountsFailed (fail-loud, no silent now-fallback). Integration (./smackerel.sh test integration --go-run 'CardCalendarBridgeLivePG' on the disposable test stack, live PG): INTEG_EXIT=0; TestCardCalendarBridgeLivePG_SyncRunAudited_H06 PASS — card_runs run_type=calendar_sync row pinned by RunID has events_written matching res.EventsWritten (>=3: 2 recs + 1 re-enrollment), each synced rec persisted its stable calendar_event_uid (round-trip), un-carded rec stored NO uid, and a re-sync appended a 2nd calendar_sync run leaving exactly one event per UID (update-not-duplicate at live-PG level); disposable stack fully torn down (all containers + 3 volumes + network removed). The CalDAV fake is an EXTERNAL-boundary fake (calendar server, keyed by UID like real CalDAV) — Store + PostgreSQL are REAL in H06, NO internal component mocked. Build Quality Gate GREEN: CHECK_EXIT=0 (config in sync + drift guard + scenario-lint), LINT_EXIT=0 (golangci-lint All checks passed! + Web validation), FORMAT_EXIT=0 (65 files already formatted — calendar*.go gofmt-clean as written), ARTIFACT_LINT_EXIT=0. No fallback default config introduced (smackerel-no-defaults); calendar_sync + calendar_uid_prefix come from the Scope 01 fail-loud SST loader. Scheduler/manual-trigger wiring is Scope 09 (Depends On 08). completedScopes [1,2,3,4,6,7,8]; currentScope 9.
